messages.author: Khanlaar
messages.text: I'm getting Meshcore started in SW Missouri. Our settings are 927.875Mhz, BW 62.5, SF 7, and CR5-8 as needed. This is because the anchor city for the region uses utility metering equipment that prevents stable communication over the default settings. This could change with future updates to Meshcore but as of right now, this is what we got.
messages.content_html: I'm getting Meshcore started in SW Missouri. Our settings are 927.875Mhz, BW 62.5, SF 7, and CR5-8 as needed.
